title: Implement local idempotent Chronik coding memory
goal: Share canonical API/CLI envelopes, import agent-run events exactly once, query by coding context and freeze hash-bound historical cohorts without a long-running service.

acceptance.assertion: API and local importer use the same canonical quality and retention envelope constructor.
Retrying the same event_id records it once and returns an import receipt.
History is filterable by repo, component, operation, outcome and time and is explicitly historical_only.
A cohort receipt binds exact query parameters, event IDs and output bytes by SHA-256.
